---
pagetitle: "Code & Tools"

listing: 
  - id: hpc
    template: ../../system/templates/listings/badges-buttons-link-accordion.ejs.html
    contents: ../../data/research/hpc.yml
    template-params:
      type: hpc
      lang: en
---

# HPC code

High-Performance Computing code to which I contributed.


::: {#hpc}
:::
